title: Arbitrage Opportunity Available In Public REITs
text: While private real estate investors couldn't help themselves from buying a record amount of property at peak prices in 2021-2022, the public REITs were actually net sellers. Instead of financing purchases with short-term floating rate debt like many private players, public REITs used the low interest rate environment to reduce floating rate exposure and extend fixed maturities.

title: 17 Fast-Growing REITs With 17 Strong Balance Sheets
